title: Heavy-Duty Toilet Plunger Unblocker with Professional Tool for Bathroom Kitchen Shower and Sinks Cleaning Plunger 28cm(11inch) Wooden Handle and 11cm(4.5inch) Rubber Suction Cup Easy Cleaning Plunger
features: Heavy-Duty Design: Built for tough unclogging jobs in bathrooms, kitchens, showers, and sinks.
Versatile Usage: Suitable for various drain types and sizes, ensuring versatility in application.
Easy Cleaning: Constructed for hassle-free maintenance and sanitation after use.
Efficient Unclogging: Helps in swiftly clearing blockages, promoting smoother drainage.
User-Friendly: Simple and intuitive design for ease of use by both professionals and homeowners.
Multipurpose: Ideal for residential and commercial use due to its heavy-duty nature and effectiveness
Durable Construction: Made from quality materials to ensure longevity and reliability.
Compact size for convenient storage when not in use
Small and Powerful plunger is made of high-quality rubber cup suction and a wood handle for long lasting.
Powerful plunger for tackling tough clogs to easy remove.
description: Introducing Ranian's 11-Inch Wood Handled Plunger with 4.5-Inch Rubber Suction Cup: Experience superior unclogging power with Ranian's premium 11-inch wood handle plunger. Designed to tackle stubborn blockages effortlessly, this durable and reliable plunger is an essential tool for any household.
